zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Golborne於1389年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親John Golborne Lord of Woodhey26歲，母親Eleanor de Courtenay15歲。她於1402年與Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey在英國英格蘭哈普爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1430年在英國英格蘭享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Golborne于1389年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲John Golborne Lord of Woodhey26岁，母亲Eleanor de Courtenay15岁。她于1402年与Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey在英国英格兰哈普爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1430年在英国英格兰享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Golborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Goulbourne
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Golborne (Lancashire), Golborne David in Handley (Cheshire), or Golborne Bellow in Tattenhall (Cheshire).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Golborne was born in 1389, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Golborne Lord of Woodhey, was 26 and her mother, Eleanor de Courtenay, was 15. She married Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey in 1402, in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1430, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Golborne est née en 1389, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Golborne Lord of Woodhey, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Courtenay, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey en 1402, à Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Golborne 1389 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Golborne Lord of Woodhey 26 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Courtenay 15. Sie hat 1402 in Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 41 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Golborne è nata il nel 1389 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Golborne Lord of Woodhey, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Courtenay, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey nel 1402, nel Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1430, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Golborneが1389年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Golborne Lord of Woodheyは26歳，母Eleanor de Courtenayは15歳であった。1402年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアでThomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodheyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1430年にイギリスイギリスで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Golborne(이)가 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Golborne Lord of Woodhey(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Courtenay(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르에서 Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Golborne nasceu em 1389, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Golborne Lord of Woodhey, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Courtenay, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey em 1402, em Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Golborne родилась в 1389 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Golborne Lord of Woodhey было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Courtenay, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey в 1402 г. в местности хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Golborne nació en 1389, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Golborne Lord of Woodhey, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Courtenay, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Thomas Wilbraham Lord of Woodhey en 1402, en Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1430, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
